description.en: I am Dr. Pawan Kumar, a senior neurologist with MBBS and MS (Neuro) specialization. I am dedicated to improving long-term neurological health and enhancing quality of life through expert diagnosis, modern treatment, and patient-friendly care of brain, spine, nerve, and neurological disorders.
description.ne: म डा. पवन कुमार, MBBS, MS (Neuro) विशेषज्ञता प्राप्त वरिष्ठ नशा रोग विशेषज्ञ हुँ। मस्तिष्क, मेरुदण्ड, नसा तथा स्नायुसम्बन्धी रोगहरूको विशेषज्ञ जाँच, आधुनिक उपचार र बिरामीमैत्री सेवामार्फत दीर्घकालीन स्नायु स्वास्थ्य सुधार र जीवनस्तर उकास्न समर्पित छु।

schedule.en: Tuesday and Thursday (4:00 PM to 5:00 PM)

specialty.ne: मधुमेह, थाईराइड तथा हर्मोन रोग विशेषज्ञ

description.en: I am an endocrinologist with MD (Endocrine) specialization, dedicated to the expert treatment of diabetes, thyroid, hormonal imbalance, and metabolic disorders. My goal is to improve long-term health through modern diagnostics, personalized treatment plans, and patient-friendly care.
description.ne: म MD (Endocrine) विशेषज्ञता प्राप्त एन्डोक्राइनोलोजिस्ट हुँ, र मधुमेह, थाइराइड, हर्मोन असन्तुलन तथा मेटाबोलिक रोगहरूको विशेषज्ञ उपचारमा समर्पित छु। मेरो लक्ष्य आधुनिक जाँच, व्यक्तिगत उपचार योजना तथा बिरामीमैत्री सेवामार्फत दीर्घकालीन स्वास्थ्य सुधार गर्नु हो।

schedule.en: First, second and third Friday (5:00 PM to 6:00 PM)
schedule.ne: पहिलो, दोस्रो र तेस्रो शुक्रबार (साँझ ५:०० बजेदेखि ६:०० बजेसम्म)

qualification: MBBS, MD (Cardio), Fellowship in cardiology (3years, Lincoln University, Malaysia) Ex Sr. Cardiologist, RAMA Heart Center, Delhi NCR, India

description.en: I am Dr. Shahid Murtuza, a senior cardiologist with MBBS, MD (Cardiology) and a Fellowship in Cardiology from Lincoln University, Malaysia. With experience as a senior cardiologist at RAMA Heart Center, Delhi NCR, India, I am dedicated to long-term heart health protection through expert examination, prevention, modern treatment, and patient-friendly service.

schedule.en: Monday, Wednesday and Friday (From 5:00 PM onwards)

qualification: MBBS, MD (Pediatric Cardiology, Pediatric cardiac critical care, fetal ECO cardiography)

With expertise in Pediatric Cardiology, Pediatric Cardiac Critical Care, and Fetal Echocardiography, I am dedicated to expert examination, modern treatment, and patient-friendly care for the heart health of infants, children, and unborn babies.
